Event: The Aboriginal Adventure
Event Date: 13/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E59
Lunar Swiftness

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit removes 3 random negative effects from self, and increases the spell power by 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random negative effects from each of 2 random allied units (preferred target: mage), and increases the spell power for self and these units by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit removes 5 random negative effects from self and each of 3 random allied units (preferred target: mage), and increases the spell power for self and these units by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 4 sec. All of the ability's targets also gain shields, the amount of which is equal to 190% / 191% / 192% / 193% / 195% / 197% / 200% of the engraving owner's spell power. Shields block damage of any type and exist for up to 4 sec.
